vols['avg_volume'] = pd.to_numeric(vols['avg_volume'], errors='coerce')
merged = troubled.merge(vols, on='Symbol', how='inner')
merged = merged.dropna(subset=['avg_volume'])
merged = merged[['Company Description','avg_volume']].rename(columns={'Company Description':'Company Name'})

result = merged_sorted.to_dict(orient='records')

print("__RESULT__:")
print(result_json)

vols['avg_volume'] = pd.to_numeric(vols['avg_volume'], errors='coerce')
merged = troubled.merge(vols, on='Symbol', how='inner')
merged = merged.dropna(subset=['avg_volume'])
merged = merged[['Company Description','avg_volume']].rename(columns={'Company Description':'Company Name'})
merged_sorted = merged.sort_values('Company Name')
result = merged_sorted.to_dict(orient='records')
result_json = json.dumps(result)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(result_json)
